name: Beef, Pepper & Mushroom Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef sirloin steak (boneless), cut into 1-inch thick pieces
1 large Bell pepper (green, red or yellow), cut into 1 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from beef steak and cut into 1 1/4-inch pieces.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together seasoning ingredients; add beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms, tossing to coat.
3. Alternately thread pieces of beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms on each of four 12-inch metal skewers.
4. Prepare rice according to package directions; keep warm.
5. Place kabobs on a rack in a broiler pan so the surface of the meat is 3 to 4 inches from heat.
6. Broil for 9 to 12 minutes, turning occasionally, until medium-rare to medium doneness.
7. Season with salt and serve kabobs with rice.
Cook's tip: To grill, place kabobs on a grid over medium, ash-covered coals. Grill for 8 to 11 minutes, turning occasionally, until medium-rare to medium doneness; season with salt.
